metadata.description: Gary Kong's customized workflow collection - a focused fork of wshobson/agents with 4 essential plugins (llm-application-dev, python-development, unit-testing, code-review-graph) optimized for personal development workflows

plugins.name: llm-application-dev
plugins.description: LLM application development with LangGraph, RAG systems, vector search, and AI agent architectures - customized from wshobson/agents for Gary's workflow

plugins.name: python-development
plugins.description: Modern Python development with Python 3.12+, Django, FastAPI, async patterns, and production best practices - customized from wshobson/agents

plugins.name: unit-testing
plugins.description: Unit and integration test automation for Python and JavaScript with debugging support - customized from wshobson/agents for Gary's workflow

plugins.name: code-review-graph
plugins.description: Code review graph with skills for debugging, codebase exploration, safe refactoring, and change review. Includes hooks for automatic graph updates on file changes.
